mapper.sql: r.recipe_id, r.created_by, r.is_admin_recommend, r.recipe_status, r.meal_type, r.food_name, r.portion, r.unit, r.calories, r.image_url, r.description, r.created_time, r.last_change_time, u.account AS creator_account, u.nickname AS creator_nickname, u.realname AS creator_realname, IFNULL(rr.rating_avg, 0.00) AS rating_avg, IFNULL(rr.rating_count, 0) AS rating_count, rl.score AS user_score
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_recipe ( created_by, is_admin_recommend, recipe_status, meal_type, food_name, portion, unit, calories, image_url, description ) VALUES ( #{createdBy}, #{adminRecommend}, #{recipeStatus}, #{mealType}, #{foodName}, #{portion}, #{unit}, #{calories}, #{imageUrl}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_recipe SET food_name = #{foodName}, meal_type = #{mealType}, portion = #{portion}, unit = #{unit}, calories = #{calories}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description} WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND recipe_status != 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_recipe r LEFT JOIN t_user u ON u.user_id = r.created_by LEFT JOIN t_recipe_rating rr ON rr.recipe_id = r.recipe_id LEFT JOIN t_recipe_rating_log rl ON rl.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND rl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE r.recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND r.recipe_status != 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_recipe SET recipe_status = 1 WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND recipe_status != 1
